title: Compact capsule, built from extracted renderers so the old preamble stays byte-identical
action: Per D6/D7/D8/D15. Extract three line renderers from buildSessionPreamble into small exported helpers in inject.mjs — the onboarding-MISSING line (:319), the gate-bypass banner (:344) and the HANDOFF block (:376) — and have buildSessionPreamble call the extracted helpers so its output is BYTE-IDENTICAL to today. Do not duplicate these renderers into the capsule; extraction is what makes D8 provable and what stops the HANDOFF heading drifting away from the two other compact-source assertions at hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs:2427-2455 and :2854-2883. Then add buildCompactCapsule(root, {sessionId}) to compaction.mjs, emitting D6's twelve items IN ORDER: (1) the intent anchor resume block via intent.mjs resumeBlock, unchanged; (2) the STATE MISMATCH line when compactCheck fails, naming each failed check plus the rule 'disk state overrides conversational recollection'; (3) the onboarding-MISSING line when it applies; (4) the HANDOFF block when one exists, wait-and-never-auto-resume instruction verbatim; (5) the gate-bypass banner when a level is active; (6) phase/mode/feature/lane; (7) the claimed cell with its verify command and dependency status; (8) the first open gate; (9) next_action; (10) the recorded standard commands; (11) the compaction survival count and, when it applies, the D9 warning; (12) a one-line pointer to where the critical patterns live. Resolve state through resolvePipeline WITH the session id, the way buildPromptReminder was fixed in v1.11.1 — a lane-bound session must read its own lane, not the default state.json. Copy both edited files to .bee/bin/lib/ in this cell (D18).

truths: buildSessionPreamble's output is byte-identical to before this cell for startup, clear and resume — the existing hook-contract rows are the negative control and must stay green untouched.
The anchor block passes through the capsule byte-unchanged, including unicode and newlines.
The capsule renders on a bare repo with no anchor, no claimed cell and no log file, emitting no nudge, no warning and no mismatch line (D15).
A lane-bound session's capsule shows that lane's phase and gates, not the default record's.
artifacts: Three exported renderer helpers in inject.mjs, called by both builders
buildCompactCapsule in compaction.mjs, plus refreshed .bee/bin/lib/ mirrors
prohibitions: Never duplicate a renderer into the capsule — one truth, two callers.
Never drop the HANDOFF block from the capsule: a compacting session is the one most likely to be holding one (AGENTS.md critical rule 6).
Never drop the critical patterns entirely — D7 requires a pointer line.

trace.dropped_reason: Slice 1 re-shaped after validation returned NOT READY (6 blocking findings). Superseded by the D19-D22 shape: hook keeps anchor ownership, per-cell manifest+ledger regen, serial chain, split cells.
